_comment: vugg-canary config. vuggPath is resolved relative to this repo root. For Phase 1 it points at the live vugg checkout; the two-folder promote (Phase 3) will repoint it at today/.

diffThreshold._comment: Alarm if a species' spawn-% moves beyond absPts (boss decision 3), OR a rare-but-present species moves by relMult-fold (fresh-eyes addendum — catches relative swings the absolute gate misses on low-frequency phases).
